campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transit authority finances, adopt a policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities, and discuss how to fill open city positions and keep staff from leaving.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's investment report for March 2026
New city policy prohibiting federal civil enforcement on city-owned property
City job vacancies and efforts to recruit and retain employees

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a hearing where residents could object to a plan to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties identified by the county. The council then approved moving forward with the cleanup work and adopted a new city policy on technology disruption.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by the county
Adoption of new Technology Disruption Policy
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial records from their previous meeting and March's monthly finances. The council authorized several spending decisions, including accepting a donation of an automated external defibrillator, signing a five-year service agreement, awarding a paving contract to O'Grady Paving, and applying for state grants.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract
Authorized five-year service agreement
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillator
Applied for state grants
Reviewed March 2026 financial reports

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and worked on organizing their June 2 agenda by adding items and scheduling time slots for discussion.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda planning and item additions
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan updates
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Approval of council-sponsored events

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select new members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas and reports from various city boards and committees.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for fiscal year 2026-27
Public comment period
Approval of previous meeting minutes
Updates from city boards and commissions

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, to conduct city business and recognize two important observances: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included approval of April minutes and a flag salute ceremony.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Affordable Housing Month observance
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element, which is part of the long-term community plan running through 2040. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their various services during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan (2015-2040)
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions including roads, sidewalks, trees, and sustainability programs
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander Month
Some agenda items were postponed to a later meeting

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss planning and development issues related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person and online.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall East Wing, 1500 Warburton Avenue
Public participation available via in-person and Zoom attendance

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 where they voted on several land development projects, considered new city rules, and appointed a permanent City Manager. The council conducted public hearings to get feedback from residents before making decisions on these items.
keyTopics: Approved a Site Development Permit Amendment and Vesting Tentative Map for a development project
Considered an Urgency Ordinance adding new regulations
Introduced a new ordinance adding a section to city code
Confirmed property assessments and related orders
Appointed a permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric appliances and heating systems in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles and programs designed to help the city meet air quality regulations set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to convert homes from gas to electric
Compliance strategies for regional Air District regulations
Proposed principles for guiding electrification assistance programs
